note: Per-program aircraft facts for the Jet Atlas. The itinerary data (data/atlas/jet/itinerary.json) carries no aircraft field, so entries key on the same brand slugs as its BRANDS map. Aircraft and capacities are the programs' typical published configurations compiled July 2026 — charter programs swap aircraft by departure; verify per trip before quoting.

planes.config: Handcrafted lie-flat leather seats, one cabin
planes.crew: Four Seasons crew, onboard chef, physician, concierge
planes.notes: The benchmark of the category — the hotel brand owns the whole experience, air and ground.
Smallest group size in the category; itineraries link Aman properties.

planes.crew: Nat Geo experts, photographers and expedition staff aboard
planes.notes: Around-the-world expedition routings with the deepest lecture program.
The most departures of any program in our Atlas; wing-style around-the-world and regional routings.
The longest-running dedicated jet-expedition operator; also flies for brand partners.

planes.aircraft: Chartered VIP jets (ACJ / Gulfstream class, varies)
planes.notes: Asia-focused bespoke jet itineraries rather than fixed-departure world tours.
Grand world tours in the French tradition; largest group size in the category.
Umbrella label for curated jet departures in the Virtuoso network.
Heli-and-jet touring of NZ lodges rather than long-haul expedition flying.
Bespoke Latin America and Mediterranean itineraries flown privately.
